author: lOrm
content: Verified: crosslink #830 addressed the naming collision via explicit serde rename (modifier-debug vs preset-debug). The matching_preset linear scan and display_name modifier-omission concerns were also reviewed: a OnceLock cache for matching_preset would have to be invalidated on every modifier mutation, and the 8-preset scan is well below the noise floor of the surrounding rendering work — documented in the matching_preset doc comment, no behaviour change.
